hero.label: Support Our Mission
hero.heading: Fuel Africa's Climate Leadership
hero.description: Your contribution directly powers research fellowships, policy dialogues, and capacity-building programmes that put African voices at the centre of global climate governance.

tiers.label: Make a Donation
tiers.heading: Choose Your Level of Support
tiers.description: Every dollar you give strengthens African capacity to lead on the technologies that will define our climate future.

impact.label: Your Impact
impact.heading: Every Contribution Creates Change
impact.description: See exactly how your donation translates into real action across the African climate technology landscape.

research.label: Funds Research Materials
research.description: Provides essential research materials and access to academic databases for one early-career climate researcher.

dialogues.label: Supports Policy Dialogues
dialogues.description: Enables participation of one African policymaker in a regional climate technology governance dialogue.

fellowship.label: Powers a Fellowship Month
fellowship.description: Covers one month of support for an ACIEFR fellow conducting African-led climate intervention research.

capacity.label: Builds Institutional Capacity
capacity.description: Delivers a short-course workshop module at a partner university in Ghana, Kenya, or South Africa.
